case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ISAIAS FIDELIO CARCAMO CHUB

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY IRENE GUERRERO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ISAIAS FIDELIO CARCAMO CHUB. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 3/15/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-27-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHUB, ISAIAS FIDELIO CARCAMO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,654.58 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CHUB, ISAIAS FIDELIO CARCAMO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHUB, ISAIAS FIDELIO CARCAMO $1,654.58 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,759.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 3/15/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CHUB, ISAIAS FIDELIO CARCAMO
